headline: Gas up 12¢/L this week
summary: Refinery outage in Sarnia tightens Ontario supply.

headline: Grocery basket up 4% month-over-month
summary: Produce and dairy lead the increase as import costs climb.

headline: BoC holds overnight rate, signals possible 25 bps hike
summary: Statement flags persistent core inflation; markets price next move higher.

headline: US announces 15% tariff on Canadian steel and aluminum
summary: Cross-border manufacturing costs expected to rise; retaliation under review in Ottawa.

headline: Gas down 3¢/L in Quebec on softer crude
summary: Brent slipped 2% overnight; pump prices easing in eastern provinces.
